_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-07 01:52:59Z)**_

Yeah — knip doesn't know your app lives in `app/`. It's treating the root as the project and has no entry points configured, so everything looks unused.

You need to tell knip about the workspace. Update `knip.json`:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-07 01:53:01Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-07 01:53:11Z)**_

Working now. Knip found real issues instead of flagging everything:

- **Unused dep**: `tailwindcss` (Tailwind v4 uses `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin, so the base package may not be directly imported)
- **Unused devDeps**: `eslint-config-prettier`, `prettier` (may be used by your editor but not referenced in eslint config)
- **Config hint**: `src/main.tsx` is already the default Vite entry, so the explicit entry in knip.json is redundant

The redundant entry hint is harmless — keeping it explicit is fine for clarity. Want me to look into any of those unused dependency findings?
